goal: Show the app version in the UI footer (bottom-left): clean released version in production builds, SemVer pre-release (e.g. v0.5.1-dev+<sha>) in dev to disambiguate dev from releases.

phases.goal: Expose the app version to the frontend at build time with a SemVer-correct dev/release distinction — no UI yet.
definition_of_done: __APP_VERSION__ (or chosen token) defined in vite.config.ts via define, sourced from package.json version
cd frontend && pnpm run type-check passes
cd frontend && pnpm test -- --run src/lib/version passes (PROD release + DEV pre-release forms)
no hardcoded version literal in version.ts
dev output is valid SemVer pre-release (-dev tag); prod has no prerelease tag

phases.goal: Render the version in a footer (bottom-left) wired into the app layout.
definition_of_done: cd frontend && pnpm test -- --run Footer passes (version text present)
pnpm run build succeeds and no unreplaced __APP_VERSION__ token in dist
footer bottom-left; dev shows -dev pre-release, prod shows clean version

summary: Build-time version inject: vite/vitest define __APP_VERSION__ (from package.json) + __GIT_SHA__ via shared build/version.ts; version.ts formatVersion/displayVersion (PROD vX.Y.Z, DEV vX.Y.Z-dev+sha); 6 tests. Tier-3: tightened DEV assertion, deduped define. CI green (CI Success).

Footer.tsx renders displayVersion() bottom-left (muted, border-t bg-card, shrink-0), wired into Layout.tsx below main. Label-light (version only, no i18n key). Footer.test.tsx (2 tests) pins version in contentinfo landmark. Build OK, no unreplaced token. Tier-3: no defects. CI green.

Cross-phase optimization assessed: 168-line all-additive feature, no duplication (shared build/version.ts extracted in phase 0), consistent conventions, twice Tier-3 reviewed. No refactor/simplify changes warranted — no optimization PR opened.
